characters.name: Angela
characters.description: Angelais a mortician hired by Nate and David as Federico's replacement after the latter leaves Fisher & Sons. She is very good at her work but they have a hard time getting used to her willingness to speak her mind. After she is asked to leave, Federico returns to work for them.

characters.name: Angela
characters.description: Angelais a mortician hired by Nate and David as Federico's replacement after the latter leaves Fisher & Sons. She is very good at her work but they have a hard time getting used to her willingness to speak her mind. After she is asked to leave, Federico returns to work for them.

characters.name: Anita Miller
characters.description: Anita MillerisClaire Fisher's former best friend. They met while attending art school and had a very close relationship which deteriorated once Claire left the school for good, while also being abandoned by her friends. When Claire broke up withRussell Corwin, he told her that he had slept with Anita. The two girls meet briefly in thefinal seasonwith Anita making it clear that she was hurt by Claire's lack of contact.

characters.name: Anthony Finelli
characters.description: Anthony Finelliwas the younger half-brother ofGabe Dimas. Not much is revealed about him except he accidentally kills himself when he finds a gun in his mother's room after his elder brother tells him to go off and play after a stoner friend visits. His death is blamed on Gabe and the latter seems to fall into a depression and becomes hooked on drugs, which is later thought to be the cause of his own death.

characters.name: Anthony Finelli
characters.description: Anthony Finelliwas the younger half-brother ofGabe Dimas. Not much is revealed about him except he accidentally kills himself when he finds a gun in his mother's room after his elder brother tells him to go off and play after a stoner friend visits. His death is blamed on Gabe and the latter seems to fall into a depression and becomes hooked on drugs, which is later thought to be the cause of his own death.

characters.name: Arthur Martin
characters.description: Arthur Martinis a one-time intern at Fisher & Sons Funeral Home. He was orphaned at age five and raised by his aunt, who homeschooled him until she died.  He went to college to study music, before giving it up to study at mortuary school in the hopes of becoming a funeral director. During his senior year, he receives a live-in apprenticeship with the Fisher family andFedericobut things soon decline whenRuthstarts thinking that their budding friendship is becoming physical. When she realizes he is unable to relate to her in a sexual way she ceases their friendship and starts acting coldly towards him during his attempts to make conversation.

characters.name: Arthur Martin

He was orphaned at age five and raised by his aunt, who homeschooled him until she died.  He went to college to study music, before giving it up to study at mortuary school in the hopes of becoming a funeral director. During his senior year, he receives a live-in apprenticeship with the Fisher family andFedericobut things soon decline whenRuthstarts thinking that their budding friendship is becoming physical. When she realizes he is unable to relate to her in a sexual way she ceases their friendship and starts acting coldly towards him during his attempts to make conversation.

characters.name: Bernard Chenowith
characters.description: Bernard Chenowithwas the husband ofMargaret Chenowithand father of their two childrenBrendaandBilly. He was raised Jewish but ultimately became an atheist. While working as a celebrity psychiatrist he met his future wifeMargaretwhile she was working in his office as a intern during the 1960s. They married in 1967 and had two childrenBrendaandBilly. They courted controversy when they made headlines for allowing their daughter to undergo testing by the renowned Dr. Gareth Feinberg for her uncontrollable behavior.

characters.name: Bernard Chenowith
characters.description: Bernard Chenowithwas the husband ofMargaret Chenowithand father of their two childrenBrendaandBilly. He was raised Jewish but ultimately became an atheist. While working as a celebrity psychiatrist he met his future wifeMargaretwhile she was working in his office as a intern during the 1960s. They married in 1967 and had two childrenBrendaandBilly. They courted controversy when they made headlines for allowing their daughter to undergo testing by the renowned Dr. Gareth Feinberg for her uncontrollable behavior.

characters.name: Bettina
characters.description: Unnamed Son BettinaisSarah O'Connor's caretaker and friend. Her brash personality and Ruth's reserved nature compliment each other and they become close friends but Bettina eggs her on into shoplifting. However, she is able to see people through drug detoxes even though she has done a few drugs herself and encourages Ruth to take some Vicodin.

characters.name: Bettina

characters.name: Billy Chenowith
characters.description: Billy Chenowithis a recurring character who is the son ofBernard ChenowithandMargaret Chenowithand the younger brother ofBrenda Chenowith. He was portrayed byJeremy Sisto. Born the youngest son of Bernard and Margaret Chenowith, Billy had a unstable childhood due to his parents being very active about their sex lives. As he grew, he started to display signs associated with bipolar disorder which caused his family, particularly his older sister, Brenda many problems.

characters.name: Billy Chenowith
characters.description: Billy Chenowithis a recurring character who is the son ofBernard ChenowithandMargaret Chenowithand the younger brother ofBrenda Chenowith. He was portrayed byJeremy Sisto. As he grew, he started to display signs associated with bipolar disorder which caused his family, particularly his older sister, Brenda many problems.

characters.name: Carol Ward
characters.description: Carol WardisLisa Kimmel's boss duringSeason TwoandSeason Three. She is neurotic, self-involved and unstable which proves incompatible with Lisa's newfound role as a wife and mother and her continuous demands lead to Lisa quitting her job. She is seen again in a videotape of Nate and Lisa's wedding where she expresses her views on relationships and marriage.

characters.name: Celeste
characters.description: Celesteis a teen pop sensation for whomKeith Charlesis hired to act as bodyguard. She is beautiful, rich, and famous yet also comes across as cruel, spoiled, self-absorbed, promiscuous, and a brat. On Keith's first day at his new job, we see Celeste talking to a guy named Fred on her phone while getting ready for an appearance onThe Ellen Degeneres Show. With her is a rabbi lawyer and she mentions to Fred that she's fine with presenting at a Nickelodeon Kid's Choice Awards show, but would not present with Hilary Duff or the Olsen twins. While being interviewed by Ellen, they talk about her new movieControl Freaksand her new CD albumMe. Here. Now!. On the show, she described her co-star Colin Farrell as “just friends” and is "really sweet" yet ironically on her way to her limo, she refers to Colin as "creepy" for leaving "another creepy message" and asks her rabbi lawyer if something can be done legally. Keith would then get in trouble with a co-worker for peeing in her toilet while she was on the show. Right before her tour, she is seen practicing with a group of men while bossing them around. She later talks to someone on the phone regarding her acting career that she doesn't want to "play herself" as she wants to play someone ugly or fat so that she would be taken as a "serious actress".

characters.name: Claire Fisher
characters.description: Edie(ex-girlfriend)Russell Corwin(ex-boyfriend) Claire Simone Fisheris the youngest child and only daughter of the Fisher family. She was portrayed byLauren Ambrose. The baby of the Fisher family, Claire struggled through a difficult childhood and adolescence. She grew up in a house constantly full of people who were either dead or grieving. Her father was killed in a hearse/bus collision one Christmas Eve and she had to drive herself to the hospital high on crystal meth.

characters.name: Claire Fisher
characters.description: Edie(ex-girlfriend)Russell Corwin(ex-boyfriend) Claire Simone Fisheris the youngest child and only daughter of the Fisher family. She was portrayed byLauren Ambrose. characters.name: Daniel Nathanson
characters.description: Daniel Nathansonis the second husband ofBrenda Chenowith. He appears in the series finale "Everyone's Waiting" as a guest atDavidandKeith's wedding alongside his stepdaughters and his heavily pregnant wife.

characters.name: Daniel Nathanson
characters.description: Daniel Nathansonis the second husband ofBrenda Chenowith. He appears in the series finale "Everyone's Waiting" as a guest atDavidandKeith's wedding alongside his stepdaughters and his heavily pregnant wife.

characters.name: David Fisher
characters.description: Jennifer Mason(ex-fiancée) David James Fisheris the second son and middle Fisher child. He is portrayed byMichael C. Hall. He is four years younger than his older brother Nate, and at the beginning of the series both share a strained relationship, mostly due to David's jealousy over Nate's escape from the Fisher home, as well as his 'Golden Boy' image with their parents, Ruth and Nathaniel Sr. This relationship soothes after Nate decides to stay and help out with the family business, and are shown to have mended their relationship by the end of Season 1, and share a close bond by the end of Season 2.

characters.name: David Fisher
characters.description: Jennifer Mason(ex-fiancée) David James Fisheris the second son and middle Fisher child. He is portrayed byMichael C. Hall. He is four years younger than his older brother Nate, and at the beginning of the series both share a strained relationship, mostly due to David's jealousy over Nate's escape from the Fisher home, as well as his 'Golden Boy' image with their parents, Ruth and Nathaniel Sr. This relationship soothes after Nate decides to stay and help out with the family business, and are shown to have mended their relationship by the end of Season 1, and share a close bond by the end of Season 2.

characters.name: Durrell and Anthony Charles - Fisher
characters.description: DurrellandAnthony Charles-Fisherare the adoptive sons ofKeith CharlesandDavid Fisher. The couple meet Anthony at an "adoption picnic" and immediately bond with him. After Mary, the surrogate mother, announces her pregnancy, plans to adopt the boy fade away but then Mary gets her period. Following this falling through, they learn that Anthony has an older brother named Durrell, who they discover they will also be adopting. For two weeks the older brother tests the waters with the couple and Keith's patience, with the latter thinking it is time for both brothers to go but David sticks up for them in front of Keith and the social worker and the adoption becomes permanent.

characters.name: Durrell and Anthony Charles - Fisher
characters.description: DurrellandAnthony Charles-Fisherare the adoptive sons ofKeith CharlesandDavid Fisher. The couple meet Anthony at an "adoption picnic" and immediately bond with him. After Mary, the surrogate mother, announces her pregnancy, plans to adopt the boy fade away but then Mary gets her period. Following this falling through, they learn that Anthony has an older brother named Durrell, who they discover they will also be adopting. For two weeks the older brother tests the waters with the couple and Keith's patience, with the latter thinking it is time for both brothers to go but David sticks up for them in front of Keith and the social worker and the adoption becomes permanent.

characters.name: Edie
characters.description: Edieis a free-spirited lesbian artist who briefly becomes romantically involved withClaire Fisheruntil she becomes bored with the latter's sexual ambivalence and they split up.

characters.name: Edie
characters.description: Edieis a free-spirited lesbian artist who briefly becomes romantically involved withClaire Fisheruntil she becomes bored with the latter's sexual ambivalence and they split up.

characters.name: Father Jack
characters.description:
Father Jackis a compassionate priest who heads the church that the Fisher family attend. AfterNathaniel Fisheris killed in a collision, the priest officiates at his funeral.
He is later seen in the flashforward in the series finale "Everyone's Waiting" officiating at the wedding ofDavid FisherandKeith Charles.

characters.name: Father Jack
characters.description:
Father Jackis a compassionate priest who heads the church that the Fisher family attend. AfterNathaniel Fisheris killed in a collision, the priest officiates at his funeral.
He is later seen in the flashforward in the series finale "Everyone's Waiting" officiating at the wedding ofDavid FisherandKeith Charles.

characters.name: Forrest Nathanson
characters.description: Forrest Nathansonis the unborn son ofDaniel NathansonandBrenda Chenowith. Although unborn, he appears as a baby bump in the series finale "Everyone's Waiting" atDavidandKeith's wedding.

characters.name: Gabriel Dimas
characters.description: Gabriel 'Gabe' Dimasis a character fromSix Feet Under. He is portrayed byEric Balfour. Gabe isClaire Fisher's boyfriend during their senior year of high school. Claire decides to break up with him when she learns that he told the whole school she sucked his toes during a sexual encounter, leading to her getting revenge by putting a severed foot in his school locker. She did not speak to him until the death of his younger maternal half-brother :Anthony Finelli. His stepfather attacked him at his brother's funeral since he blamed Gabe for being the one who told Anthony to go off and play, leading to him finding the gun he accidentally killed himself with. Gabe ends up overdosing and Claire tries to help him recover. However, he holds up a convenience store, stealing the Fishers' embalming fluid to use for extra-potent joints, and pulling a gun on another driver while Claire is trying to drive him to a secluded area. They split up again and she later receives closure from a fantasy sequence in which she believes he has killed himself in order to be with his younger brother. We do not know exactly if this is also true in reality.

characters.name: Gary Deitman
characters.description: Gary DeitmanisClaire Fisher's high school guidance counsellor.

characters.name: Gary Deitman
characters.description: Gary DeitmanisClaire Fisher's high school guidance counsellor.

characters.name: George Sibley
characters.description: George SibleyisRuth Fisher's second husband.  Upon their marriage he becomes a stepfather to her three children. A professor of geology, he has been married six times previously with two children, a son named Brian and a daughter namedMaggie. While still a student he dated a woman who became pregnant and gave birth to a boy named Kyle. However, George signed away his custodial rights which led to Kyle hating him and thus sending him horrible packages while he was with Ruth. They later reconciled with her help.

characters.name: George Sibley
characters.description: George SibleyisRuth Fisher's second husband.  Upon their marriage he becomes a stepfather to her three children. A professor of geology, he has been married six times previously with two children, a son named Brian and a daughter namedMaggie. While still a student he dated a woman who became pregnant and gave birth to a boy named Kyle. However, George signed away his custodial rights which led to Kyle hating him and thus sending him horrible packages while he was with Ruth. They later reconciled with her help.

characters.name: Hiram Gunderson
characters.description: Hiram Gundersonis a retired chef and hairdresser. A divorcee and environmentalist, he meetsRuth Fisherwhen she gets her hair done by him. They date for several months following the death of her husband and he takes her on camping trips, getting her to feel more comfortable with her sex life. However, they split when he reveals he has feelings for another woman but when she is attending a self-help seminar she contacts him and he mistakenly believes she wants to get back with him.

characters.name: Hiram Gunderson
characters.description: Hiram Gundersonis a retired chef and hairdresser. A divorcee and environmentalist, he meetsRuth Fisherwhen she gets her hair done by him. They date for several months following the death of her husband and he takes her on camping trips, getting her to feel more comfortable with her sex life. However, they split when he reveals he has feelings for another woman but when she is attending a self-help seminar she contacts him and he mistakenly believes she wants to get back with him.

characters.name: Hoyt Woodworth
characters.description: Hoyt Woodworthwas the husband ofLisa Kimmel's sister Barbara Woodworth and therefore Lisa's brother-in-law. After Nate discovers a photo that places Hoyt on the beach where Lisa disappeared, he confronts Hoyt, but the latter tries to pin the guilt on him saying that Lisa had told him what it was like being married to Nate, making it appear that she committed suicide. However, Nate says she may have left him behind but she would never do that to Maya. This forces Hoyt to come clean about their affair, saying that he could not let her tell Barb but reveals only that they spent hours on the beach with him playing guitar and singing to her. Then upon seeing his wife listening in, he commits suicide by shooting himself in the mouth.

Then upon seeing his wife listening in, he commits suicide by shooting himself in the mouth.

characters.name: Jake
characters.description: Jakeis a criminal who carjacksDavid Fisherand takes him on a night-long joyride throughout the city, beating him, forcing him to do drugs and ultimately putting a gun in his mouth, before driving away with his car. He is eventually arrested and David visits him in prison, hoping to get closure on his ordeal but instead finds that Jake is so detached from reality. Although he gets no answers, David is satisfied that Jake is visibly miserable and tells him that he will not be coming back.

characters.name: Jake

characters.name: Jennifer Mason
characters.description: Jennifer MasonisDavid Fisher's ex-fiancée. She dated him prior to the beginning of the series but he called off their engagement due to uncertainty over his sexuality. Jennifer shows up at the house looking for David and they go out to dinner. While there, he gets drunk and learns that his father always knew that he was gay.

characters.name: Jennifer Mason
characters.description: Jennifer MasonisDavid Fisher's ex-fiancée. She dated him prior to the beginning of the series but he called off their engagement due to uncertainty over his sexuality. Jennifer shows up at the house looking for David and they go out to dinner. While there, he gets drunk and learns that his father always knew that he was gay.

characters.name: Jimmy
characters.description: Jimmywas a friend ofClaire Fisher's while she attended art school. He wanted to date her but eventually realised that she was not interested in him in that way. However, they had sex and he was responsible for giving her her first orgasm. He had a habit of doing drugs and drinking but introduced Claire to her first gallery owner. They remained friends until she quit art school. Many of Claire's friends believed he andRussell Corwinhad a brief fling which the latter openly denied.

characters.name: Jimmy
characters.description: Jimmywas a friend ofClaire Fisher's while she attended art school. He wanted to date her but eventually realised that she was not interested in him in that way. However, they had sex and he was responsible for giving her her first orgasm. He had a habit of doing drugs and drinking but introduced Claire to her first gallery owner. They remained friends until she quit art school. Many of Claire's friends believed he andRussell Corwinhad a brief fling which the latter openly denied.

characters.name: Joe
characters.description: JoeisBrenda Chenowith's neighbor who becomes her boyfriend while she is separated fromNate Fisher. A gifted French horn player, he initially annoys her with his incessant playing but the two later put their differences aside and become a couple. They even plan to buy a house together and have a baby, but their relationship ends when he walks in on her and Nate together.

characters.name: Joe

characters.name: Karla Charles
characters.description: Karla Denise Charlesis the sister ofKeith Charlesand the mother ofTaylor Benoit. Appearing inSeason Two, she is a drug user whosedaughteris sent to live with herbrotherandDavid Fisherafter her rehabilitation program fails and she ends up incarcerated. Following herbrother's arrest due to an assault while on dutyTayloris sent to live with her grandparents.
